prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of NFLX, the stock typically exhibits annualized volatility around 35-40%. For a 22-day period, this translates to approximately 10-12% price movement range. The point estimate assumes no directional bias, while confidence intervals are constructed using standard statistical methods assuming log-normal price distribution. The intervals widen appropriately as confidence level increases, reflecting greater uncertainty over the 3-week time horizon.
